series_metadata.series_description: This form is completed and signed by the insurance company/agent with a 30-day cancellation clause, to include the minimum amounts of insurance, policy numbers and effective dates. This form guarantees the State of Ohio will be reimbursed for any damages that may occur during any permitted move.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper documents two years expired or cancelled or scanned ; Electronic: scanned images two years expired or cancelled
